name: @paideia/paideia-backend
description: Paideia LMS - Simple, Robust, and Lightweight Learning Management System in a Single Executable

scripts.migrate:create: bun scripts/clean-s3.ts && PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts bun payload  migrate:create
scripts.migrate:refresh: PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts bun payload  migrate:refresh --force-accept-warning && bun scripts/clean-s3.ts
scripts.migrate:fresh: PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts bun payload  migrate:fresh --force-accept-warning && bun scripts/clean-s3.ts
scripts.typegen: PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts bun payload  generate:types && PAYLOAD_CONFIG_PATH=src/payload.config.ts bun payload  generate:db-schema
scripts.test:all: mkdir -p tests/reports && LOG_FILE=tests/reports/$(date +%Y-%m-%d).log && (bun test $(find . -type f -name '*.test.ts' -not -path './node_modules/*') 2>&1 | tee "$LOG_FILE") && bun scripts/process-test-log.ts "$LOG_FILE"
